dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9207 IH: Military Pension Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Van Drew introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to exclude pensions of members of the Armed Forces from gross income.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Military Pension Protection Act.

section.header: Exclusion from gross income of pensions of members of the Armed Forces

subsection.text: Part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by inserting after section 112 the following new section:

section.header: Pensions of members of the Armed Forces
section.text: Gross income shall not include any amount received as a pension or annuity from the Federal Government for service as a member of the Armed Forces of the United States (whether received by such member or a beneficiary of such member).

subsection.text: The table of sections for part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of such Code is amended by inserting after the item relating to section 112 the following new item:

toc.toc-entry: Sec. 113. Pensions of members of the Armed Forces.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after the date of the enactment of this Act.
